scripts.allchecks: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test:seo
scripts.lint: npm run lint:css && npm run lint:text
scripts.lint:text: npm run lint:text:style && npm run lint:text:spell
scripts.lint:text:debug: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const files = JSON.parse(spawnSync(process.execPath, ['./tools/content-lint.mjs'], { encoding: 'utf8' }).stdout || '[]'); console.log('content lint: checking ' + files.length + ' non-draft markdown files under content/'); files.forEach((file) => console.log(file)); console.log(''); console.log('--- textlint --debug ---'); let result = spawnSync('npx', ['textlint', '--debug', ...files], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); if (result.status !== 0) process.exit(result.status ?? 1); console.log(''); console.log('--- cspell -v ---'); result = spawnSync('npx', ['cspell', 'lint', '-v', '--show-context', '--show-suggestions', ...files], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); process.exit(result.status ?? 0);"
scripts.lint:text:spell: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const files = JSON.parse(spawnSync(process.execPath, ['./tools/content-lint.mjs'], { encoding: 'utf8' }).stdout || '[]'); const result = files.length === 0 ? { status: 0 } : spawnSync('npx', ['cspell', 'lint', '--no-progress', '--show-context', '--show-suggestions', ...files], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); process.exit(result.status ?? 0);"
scripts.lint:text:style: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const files = JSON.parse(spawnSync(process.execPath, ['./tools/content-lint.mjs'], { encoding: 'utf8' }).stdout || '[]'); const result = files.length === 0 ? { status: 0 } : spawnSync('npx', ['textlint', ...files], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); process.exit(result.status ?? 0);"
scripts.update-modules: node ./scripts/clearModules.js && hugo mod clean --all && hugo mod get -u ./... && hugo mod tidy
